checks.description: All four export presets (web/linux/macos/windows) parse and have valid export_path.
Build metadata loads with a known build_kind.
Save/load round-trip preserves all 8 model summaries.
Achievement catalog loads and unlock events route correctly.
Demo scope gate rejects every feature in the demo manifest when build_kind==demo.
Credits screen loads and renders the catalog.
Release build is uploaded to the storefront and visible to customers.
Default language list matches the storefront metadata.
Telemetry endpoint responds to a probe request.
Weekly review of crash bundles and player telemetry.
Monthly patch cadence is published and shipped.
Community mod / forum queue is reviewed at least weekly.
